title: Crocs Unisex-Adult Classic Clog
description_text: It’s the iconic clog that started a comfort revolution around the worldThe irreverent go-to comfort shoe that you're sure to fall deeper in love with day after day. Crocs Classic Clogs offer lightweight Iconic Crocs Comfort. All Crocs™ shoes are uniquely designed and manufactured using our proprietary closed-cell resin, Croslite™, a technology that gives each pair of shoes the soft, comfortable, lightweight and non-marking qualities that Crocs™ wearers know and love. Heat: do not expose your Crocs™ shoes to extreme heat or intense sunlight for an extended period of time. Due to the unique nature of the Crocs™ PCCR material, high temperatures may cause them to warp. Crocs shoes should solely be hand washed. If the model features a lining, it is recommended to put the lining in a mesh fabric or use a delicate cycle (of up to 30 °) if you machine wash. Cleaning your Crocs using the washing machine is at your own risk Looking for the ultimate warm-weather shoe? Crocs' Classic clog has a ventilated upper and a traction outsole to make it a top wet-dry performer--perfect for the beach--but we can think of a zillion other places you'll want to wear it.

description_text: CLARKS BREEZE SEA - This lightweight Cloudsteppers™ flip flop benefits from a hook and loop closure that ensures a secure fit. Eine EVA-Mittelsohle hilft ihm sich schwerelos anzufühlen und ein luftiges EVA-Fußbett absorbiert Stöße ohne zusätzliches Gewicht hinzuzufügen.CLARKS BREEZE SEA - הכפכף קל המשקל הזה Cloudsteppers™ מרוויח מסגירת וו ולולאה המבטיחה התאמה בטוחה. סוליה אמצעית EVA מסייעת לה להרגיש חסרת משקל ומדרס EVA אוורירי סופג זעזועים מבלי להוסיף משקל.Clarks Breeze Sea – Este chinelo leve Cloudsteppers™ se beneficia de um fecho de velcro que garante um ajuste seguro. Uma entressola de EVA ajuda a sentir peso e uma palmilha de EVA respirável absorve o choque sem adicionar peso.Clarks BreezE SEA - 这款轻质 Cloudsteppers™ 人字拖采用钩环闭合设计,确保安全贴合。 EVA 中底帮助它感觉轻盈，透气的 EVA 鞋垫可吸收冲击力而不增加重量。CLARKS BREEZE SEA - 這款輕量 Cloudsteppers™ 人字拖採用鉤環閉合,確保安全貼合。 EVA 中底有助於感覺輕盈,透氣的 EVA 鞋墊可以吸收衝擊,而不會增加重量。클라크 브리즈 씨 - 이 가벼운 Cloudsteppers™ 플립플롭은 안전한 착용감을 보장하는 후크 앤 루프 클로저의 이점을 제공합니다.
